name: Tips 10/14/97
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut lettuce with a plastic knife to keep it from turning limp and brown.
2. Instead of cutting it, whack the core on the counter top a couple of times; it will loosen enough to just turn slightly and pull out.
3. Cut a couple of parchment sheets to fit your work area.
4. Lay down the dirty implements on the parchment paper so you don't have to clean the counter when you're done.
5. Discard the parchment paper after use; its cost is very small, around 4 cents per sheet for this purpose.
